race.comment: ADVANCE TO JAFFA (1) last raced on May 2 when beaten 7 lengths into seventh at this track over 1625m after being up on the pace until straightening. Good enough on his day and can run a bold race. MISTER MIGHTY (7) raced below his best last time when tenth over 1350m at Ipswich, beaten 6 lengths. Finds a more suitable contest and can get the job done. SWEET PRETENDER (8) missed the placings two runs back then was never in contention last start when 7 lengths away in tenth over 1350m at Doomben. Is better than that run suggests and has the talent to figure prominently. SIR MEMPHIS (6) lightly raced gelding who was beaten 0.8 lengths into second last start over 1300m at this track. Can measure up with the right run.
